arts.ttl: What Hull City can expect from a pivotal January transfer window
arts.sum: A busy, congested month of business has now started and for Hull City, they have until Monday, February 3 at 11pm to get the deals done they feel will help Ruben Selles guide the Tigers away from trouble in the remaining months of the season. City were one of the Championship's busiest clubs in the summer with a flurry of permanent and loan transfers followed by the arrivals of Joao Pedro and Steven Alzate, and in truth, the success of their major recruitment drive has been mixed.

arts.ttl: Hull City rocked by another injury concern for Middlesbrough clash as summer signing returns
arts.sum: The ex-Boro loanee has returned to training with no reaction to his issue and will be in the squad to take on Michael Carrick's side at the MKM Stadium; however, Ryan Longman is doubtful for the maiden game of 2025. Ryan Giles will return to the Hull City squad for their New Year's Day meeting with his former club Middlesbrough, but there was less positive news elsewhere.
Aidan Perkins previews the New Year's Day fixtures in the Championship and has a score prediction for all 12 games.

arts.ttl: The good, the bad and the ugly amid tumultuous 2024 at Hull City
arts.sum: City began the year dreaming of a return to the Premier League after a seven-year absence, and instead, they'll wake up on New Year's Day praying the Tigers remain in the Championship, albeit in better spirits after two wins in the final three games to give them some much-needed festive cheer. At least the year ended with a draw and victory following the appointment of Ruben Selles, which gave Tigers fans some much needed cheer at the MKM Stadium, which had been badly lacking.

arts.sum: Hull City are ‘evaluating’ the futures of loan trio Finley Burns, Chris Bedia and Carl Rushworth, as detailed… The post Hull City weighing up future of loan trio ahead of January appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: ‘Another good result’ – Hull City vs Middlesbrough prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Hull City vs Middlesbrough prediction ahead of the Championship clash on New Year's Day. The post ‘Another good result’ – Hull City vs Middlesbrough prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: One word that sums up Middlesbrough's 2024 with bold Championship promotion claim made
arts.sum: The Sky Sports pundit has raved about Boro since the summer and despite the club's frustrations at times this season with throwing away games in which, on the balance of play, they should have won. EFL expert Don Goodman used the word 'progression' to describe Middlesbrough's 2024 and made a bold claim that he believes they're one of three best teams in the Championship.

arts.ttl: Hull City have big transfer decision to make over Manchester City man
arts.sum: Since joining from the reigning Premier League champions, Burns has started just one game, playing only 84 minutes of football in the Championship and 70 in the Carabao Cup, and discussions have been held with the player, and his parent club over what happens in the second half of the season. "The situation with Finn is a very (interesting one)," Selles told Hull Live when asked what the future holds for the former Stevenage loanee.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough transfer domino effect that will determine any or all January business
arts.sum: They won’t want to de-register a player for the rest of the season and still pay them a wage when they can’t play unless it’s a scenario like Alex Bangura - left out of the squad due to long-term injury rather than selection. Instead, Boro go into the window open-minded as to any opportunities that might crop up for them, and will have means to be creative with their squad should anything materialise that they feel can’t be passed up on.
